description: You are a green building consultant. The Energy3D project 'building-orientation.ng3' is open. This model has its long axis facing South, which may not be ideal for a hot desert climate. Your task: 1. Change the project's geographical location to Phoenix, AZ. 2. Select the building (or its foundation) and change its azimuth (rotation) by approximately 90 degrees to face East/West. 3. Run an 'Annual Energy Analysis' to calculate the new heating and cooling loads (ensure the graph appears). 4. Save the modified project as 'phoenix_rotated.ng3' in the ~/Documents/Energy3D/ directory.
